description: Three broad deep prompts solve only cases selected by the pre-registered maximum-disagreement router.

strategies.name: Frozen Deep Reconstruction Trio
strategies.description: Interwoven/lag, phase-congruence, and recurrence/procedure reconstruction are combined by deterministic plurality.

stages.instruction: This case was selected because eleven broad generators returned eleven distinct answers. Reconstruct it independently with the assigned method and return only an exactly replayable continuation.
